mission.goal: DEMO: Data Worker portfolio — 5 trusted lists, 18 companies, CARA trail. Also clickable as full investigator.
mission.notes: Safe to delete. Re-run `pnpm seed` to reset this mission.

discoveryBrief.approach: Phase 0: inventory suitable lists for Haarlemmermeer x painters (KvK, local business association, quality marks). CARA on sources before company deep-check.
discoveryBrief.successCriteria: >=5 CARA-accepted/adjusted lists; then rank companies by weighted list coverage.
discoveryBrief.notes: Data Worker unlocks Import at 5 trusted lists.

investigations.title: Blacklist flags on SnelSchilder Direct
investigations.outcome: Disagree + blacklist: only on rejected SEO-farm list; kvk_gate fail.

investigations.title: Trade fair list discovery value
investigations.outcome: Useful for candidates; weak for trust alone.

investigations.title: DNS age as sole trust metric
investigations.outcome: Rejected as sole metric; kept as supporting signal only.

investigations.title: Local association vs commercial directory
investigations.outcome: Association lists outperform GBP-only discovery for painters.

investigations.title: KvK as primary registry source
investigations.outcome: Registry sources are hard gates, not vibe scores.

observations.statement: Company site schilderbedrijfvoorbeeld.nl has WHOIS creation date 2003-04-11.
Ondernemersvereniging Haarlemmermeer publishes a public member directory for painters.
KvK Handelsregister lists active chamber registration numbers for Dutch companies.
Gemeente Haarlemmermeer website links to local ondernemersvereniging pages.

evidence.title: OVH member directory screenshot / PDF page
evidence.snippet: Voorbeeld BV and De Wit listed as painting members since 2011.

hypotheses.statement: DNS age alone is sufficient to certify trustworthiness.
hypotheses.rationale: Rejected: longevity helps as a signal, never as a sole decision. Kept as knowledge.

hypotheses.statement: Google Business Profile alone is a weak primary trust source for painters.
Local business associations are better trust indicators than commercial directories.
hypotheses.rationale: Longevity and local accountability may outperform paid listings.

sources.name: Netwerk Vakschilders Haarlemmermeer
sources.reason: Local initiative for cooperation among independent painters.

content_consistency.note: Local initiative; list is complete but lacks a formal audit

summary_reasons: ? Lacks formal independent audit for trusted status

sources.notes: Waiting for member-list audit before treating as trusted.

sources.name: TopSchildersGids.nl

content_consistency.note: Generic copy, no specific company info, many external affiliate links

real_world_presence.notes: No trace of physical activity or mentions outside its own site

sources.notes: Rejected for lack of real-world presence and young domain age.

sources.name: De Betere Schilder
sources.reason: Quality organisation with strict admission rules and periodic audits.

real_world_presence.notes: Active quality organisation with in-person meetings

summary_reasons: ✓ Strict admission rules and periodic audits

sources.notes: The leading quality mark for painters in the Netherlands.

sources.name: Nederlandse Schilders Bond
sources.reason: Independent trade organisation for consumers and craftspeople.

sources.name: BNI Haarlemmermeer chapter
sources.reason: Local network of entrepreneurs who refer each other.
sources.notes: Waiting for formal approval of the chapter list.

sources.name: Haarlems Dagblad — bedrijfspagina
sources.reason: Local media attention can indicate real-world presence.

summary_reasons: ? Company listings are often paid or shallow

sources.notes: Waiting for linkage of specific company mentions.

sources.name: BouwBeurs deelnemerslijst 2024
sources.notes: Low weight accepted; one-off participation without strict screening.

sources.name: Ondernemersvereniging Haarlemmermeer
sources.reason: Local network of active companies in the region.
sources.notes: Weight lowered from 80 to 65 due to limited local coverage.

sources.name: Google Business Profile
sources.reason: Digital discoverability and reviews, but easy to manipulate.

content_consistency.note: Platform is reliable; individual profiles are not necessarily

real_world_presence.notes: Reliable at platform level; entry-level verification only

sources.notes: Do not treat as trusted without extra verification.

sources.name: KvK Handelsregister
sources.reason: Official base registry of all Dutch companies.

companies.name: Budget Schilderwerk
companies.profileSnippet: Budget-oriented painting for private homes in Haarlemmermeer. Fast jobs, limited specialisations.

companies.name: Vakschilder Jansen
companies.profileSnippet: Vakschilder Jansen handles interior and exterior painting including wood-rot repair for private clients and HOAs in Badhoevedorp.

companies.name: Renovatie Experts Haarlemmermeer
companies.profileSnippet: Renovatie Experts Haarlemmermeer combines painting with renovation and project leadership for homes and commercial sites.

companies.name: Schilderbedrijf Zwanenburg
companies.profileSnippet: Schilderbedrijf Zwanenburg handles painting and wallpapering for private clients and HOAs in Zwanenburg and nearby.

companies.name: De Lokale Schilder
companies.profileSnippet: De Lokale Schilder works neighbourhood-focused for private clients in Haarlemmermeer.

companies.name: Meesters in Verf BV
companies.profileSnippet: Meesters in Verf BV focuses on larger painting projects for HOAs, businesses and municipalities, including spray work.

companies.name: Schilderwerken Van Dijk
companies.profileSnippet: Schilderwerken Van Dijk is a family business for classic interior and exterior painting for private clients.

companies.name: Onderhoudsbedrijf K&VK
companies.profileSnippet: Onderhoudsbedrijf K&VK combines painting with wood-rot repair and maintenance contracts for HOAs and businesses.

companies.name: Atelier Kleurrijk
companies.profileSnippet: Atelier Kleurrijk focuses on interior painting, wallpapering and colour advice for private clients.

companies.name: Verf & Co Haarlemmermeer
companies.profileSnippet: Verf & Co combines painting with colour advice from a local showroom in Haarlemmermeer.

companies.name: Schildersbedrijf De Veen
companies.profileSnippet: Schildersbedrijf De Veen is a local painting firm for interior and exterior work for private clients and HOAs.

companies.name: Kevin Peter Schilderwerken
companies.profileSnippet: Kevin Peter Schilderwerken offers painting and wallpapering for private homes in the Haarlemmermeer area.

companies.name: Reekers Schilders
companies.profileSnippet: Reekers Schilders specialises in exterior painting and airless spray work for homes and commercial buildings.

companies.name: Van der Laan Schilderwerken
companies.profileSnippet: Van der Laan Schilderwerken delivers full-service painting including spray work and wood-rot repair for homes, HOAs and commercial sites.

companies.name: SnelSchilder Direct
companies.profileSnippet: SnelSchilder Direct claims fast interior painting jobs for private clients; limited track record.

companies.name: Schildersbedrijf T. de Wit
companies.profileSnippet: Schildersbedrijf T. de Wit specialises in exterior work and wood-rot repair, including heritage buildings.

companies.name: QuickPaint Online
companies.profileSnippet: QuickPaint Online schedules painting jobs digitally; focus on fast interior and spray work.

companies.name: Schilderbedrijf Voorbeeld BV
companies.profileSnippet: Schilderbedrijf Voorbeeld BV offers broad painting with colour advice and warranty for private clients, HOAs and businesses.

reviews.reason: Blacklist flag added after multiple reports of fraud via fake invoices.
Score adjusted down; recent ownership change not yet reflected in KvK.
Matches all trusted sources; strong local reputation.
Low weight accepted; one-off fair participation without strict screening.
Well-regarded quality mark with strict admission rules and periodic audits.
Domain <6 months old, no physical address, typical link-farm structure.
Weight adjusted to 65 because local coverage in Haarlemmermeer is thinner than national.
Base registry — reliable and legally required.

findings.summary: Agreed company Schilderbedrijf Voorbeeld BV — on all 5 trusted lists.
Agreed source KvK Handelsregister (DEMO worker portfolio).

patterns.insight: Local business associations with multi-year history consistently strengthen trust judgement versus commercial directories alone.

journal.title: CARA: finish pending sources + company candidates
journal.body: GBP still pending_review; drafts (BNI + Netwerk) ready for CARA. Import unlocked at 5 trusted lists.

journal.title: Member list found
journal.body: Local schildersvereniging published a 2024 member PDF — good bulk-import candidate.

journal.title: Verify KvK as registry source
journal.body: Confirm KvK is usable as hard identity gate (not weighted vibe).

journal.title: Kickoff — DEMO
journal.body: Human investigator run. No OmegaClaw. Goal: map sources first, then company lists.
